critical_invariants: Refund amounts must never round in the customer's favor beyond one cent.

self_review.findings: the checkout refund rounding used floating-point cents and lost a cent under split payments; switched to integer-cent math before submit
risks: floating-point refund rounding drifts under split payment

self_review.findings: the email digest smtp retry loop double-sent notifications on transient failures; added idempotency keys before submit
